---
title: "Psychiatrie"
---

## Psychoactif {#psychoactif .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="psychoactif">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.psychoactif.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/psychoactif.png" alt="Psychoactif">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.psychoactif.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Psychoactif</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Psychoactif
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Psychotropes {#psychotropes .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="psychotropes">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.psychotropes.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/psychotropes.png" alt="Psychotropes">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.psychotropes.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Psychotropes</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Réseau PIC {#reseaupic .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="reseaupic">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://reseau-pic.info/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/reseaupic.png" alt="Réseau PIC">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://reseau-pic.info/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Réseau PIC</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
